overview: Gulag DAO White Paper — a visually immersive, lore-driven informational portal for Gulag DAO on the Internet Computer. Features comprehensive tokenomics documentation including the GULAG governance token dual-arena model, PAYOK utility coin, phased treasury, anti-whaling protocols, and the full DAO founding narrative and ecosystem structure.
features: Full GULAG Token tokenomics documentation with dual-arena model
Watchtower image on hero splash screen
Ten EcoSystems dropdown with modal descriptions
Governance portal with on-chain voting documentation
Integrated apps and affiliated apps modals
Coming Soon gating for pre-sale and whitelisting portals
Fixed header, footer navigation, and scroll-to-top behavior
